_comment: Hand-curated source of truth for the 2026 driver-rankings feature. Each entry is one outlet's published ranking of 2026 drivers, in the exact order that outlet presents them (position 1 = that outlet's #1 pick). Model strings must match across outlets so the same club lines up in the table — keep them consistent when you add/refresh a source. After editing, run `npm run rankings` to regenerate public/data/driver-rankings.json. Sources that do not publish an ordinal ranking (e.g. GolfTec's unranked showcase) or that list stale prior-generation clubs (e.g. T5Golf) are deliberately excluded.

rankers.name: MyGolfSpy
rankers.title: Best Drivers of 2026
rankers.note: Most Wanted robot + human test, 42 drivers — overall podium
